statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from `users` where `shortlist` = 1
select count(*) as aggregate from `user_admission` where `session` is not null

select `courses`.`location` as `region`, count(*) as total from `users` inner join `courses` on `users`.`registered_course` = `courses`.`id` where `users`.`registered_course` is not null group by `courses`.`location`

select `courses`.`course_name`, count(*) as total from `users` left join `courses` on `users`.`registered_course` = `courses`.`id` where `registered_course` is not null group by `courses`.`course_name`
select DATE(created_at) as date, count(*) as total from `users` group by `date` order by `date` asc limit 30
select `gender`, count(*) as total from `users` where `gender` is not null group by `gender`

select CASE
WHEN age BETWEEN 15 AND 19 THEN "15-19"
WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 24 THEN "20-24"
WHEN age BETWEEN 25 AND 35 THEN "25-35"
WHEN age BETWEEN 36 AND 45 THEN "36-45"
WHEN age >= 45 THEN "45+"
ELSE "Unknown"
END as age_group, count(*) as total from `users` group by `age_group` order by MIN(age) asc

select `courses`.`location` as `region`, count(*) as total from `user_admission` inner join `courses` on `user_admission`.`course_id` = `courses`.`id` where `user_admission`.`course_id` is not null and `user_admission`.`session` is not null group by `courses`.`location`

select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` in (7) and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\Admin'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (7) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\Admin'
